commands.purpose: Detect the target project stack for SonarQube configuration.
commands.when_to_run: During harness bootstrap or when project stack markers change.
commands.failure_protocol: Record a control gap and inspect project stack markers.

commands.purpose: Generate project-specific Docker SonarQube configuration files.
commands.when_to_run: During harness bootstrap or when Sonar settings need regeneration.
commands.failure_protocol: Record a control gap and inspect generated Sonar files.

commands.purpose: Start the local SonarQube Docker service and wait until its system API reports UP.
commands.when_to_run: During harness init and before Sonar scanner execution.
commands.success_signal: exit code 0 and sonar-config.json status running
commands.failure_protocol: Check Docker availability, port conflicts, and Sonar health output before retrying.

commands.purpose: Verify local SonarQube runtime health through the system status API.
commands.when_to_run: Before scanning, after Docker restart, and during verification.
commands.success_signal: JSON output with ok true and status UP
commands.failure_protocol: Run failure attribution and inspect sonar-config.json last_error.

commands.purpose: Run the Docker-based Sonar scanner and capture quality evidence.
commands.success_signal: exit code 0 and Sonar scanner success
commands.failure_protocol: Run failure attribution before repair or waiver.

commands.purpose: Stop the local SonarQube Docker Compose services.
commands.when_to_run: After verification or when reclaiming local runtime resources.
commands.success_signal: exit code 0 and sonar-config.json status stopped
commands.failure_protocol: Inspect Docker Compose output and record residual runtime cleanup risk.
